name: Whispering Farms Equestrian Center
description: A full-service equestrian facility in the Dallas/Fort Worth area offering exceptional boarding and training with a focus on horse welfare and rider development. Staff is on premises 24/7, providing premium Tifton 85 hay four times daily and top-quality grain. Three in-house trainers plus an assistant trainer host clinics and special events throughout the year.

trainers.name: Whispering Farms Training Team
trainers.bio: Three in-house trainers specializing in dressage, eventing, and hunter/jumper disciplines.

name: Meadow Lake Equestrian Center
description: A picturesque 130-acre full-care boarding and show facility in Lancaster, Kentucky. With 45 roomy stalls across 3 barns, spacious paddocks with traditional 4-board fencing, and multiple arenas including a large well-lit indoor, Meadow Lake offers top-quality care in a quiet atmosphere. The facility hosts Mini Trials, Combined Tests, and USEF/USDF Dressage Classics, and features the Ashley Inn Bed & Breakfast with 6 guest rooms.

trainers.name: Meadow Lake Coaching Staff
trainers.bio: Multiple on-site coaches providing lessons and training in eventing and dressage at all levels.

name: North Jersey Equestrian Center
description: The Tri-State's premiere riding center featuring New Jersey's largest climate-controlled indoor arena at 135x300 feet. With 103 matted 12x12 stalls, trainers specializing in Western, English, Hunters, Jumpers, and Dressage, and seven-day-a-week operation from 8am to 8pm. Horses receive three daily feedings and turnout seven days weekly.

trainers.name: NJEC Training Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced trainers covering Western, English, Hunters, Jumpers, and Dressage at all levels.

name: Riviere Equestrian Farm
description: A world-class equestrian facility inaugurated in March 2022, located just 7 miles from the World Equestrian Center and HITS Ocala. Features 22 brand new rubber-matted stalls, a covered arena (220x120 ft), large paddocks with daily turnout, and an A/C tack room. Offers full board, dry stalls, and specialized retirement board with individualized care for retired horses.

trainers.name: Riviere Farm Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced equestrian professionals providing top-quality care and training near the World Equestrian Center.

name: Eden Farms
description: A family-owned horse stable on 160 acres of rolling fields in Upstate South Carolina near Greenville. Offers 40 stalls, horseback riding lessons, trail rides through the Blue Ridge Mountains, and hosts birthday parties and special events. Home to the Happy Hooves Therapeutic Equestrian Center, serving special needs children and adults through equine-assisted programs.

trainers.name: Eden Farms Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced staff providing riding instruction, trail guiding, and therapeutic equestrian programs.

name: Castlewood Ranch
description: A 30-acre private equestrian facility in the Aptos Hills of California. Offers limited horse boarding in covered pipe stalls, large shared paddocks, or seasonal pasture. Features a 60-foot redwood round pen with sanded and rubberized footing, a 100x120 arena with adjustable and fixed jumps, a cross-country course with 10 field-type jumps, and a hot/cold wash station with two covered groom areas.

trainers.name: Castlewood Ranch Instructor
trainers.bio: Experienced instructor offering individual and group lessons with a focus on jumping and cross-country training.

name: James River Equestrian Center
description: A well-established boarding and training facility in Richmond, Virginia featuring 22 spacious 12x12 stalls, two dusk-to-dawn lighted arenas, and abundant turnout space. Stall boarders receive a mandatory weekly lesson to ensure rider-horse partnership development. Field boarding is also available for horses that thrive in an outdoor setting.

trainers.name: JREC Instructor
trainers.bio: Experienced riding instructor providing mandatory weekly lessons for stall boarders and optional training programs.

name: Garrod Farms Stable
description: A unique equestrian facility paired with an estate winery in the heart of Silicon Valley. Set in Saratoga, California, Garrod Farms offers boarding options ranging from fields and pastures to paddocks and barn stalls. Special services include custom feeding programs, horse trailer parking, and tack boxes. A great option for Bay Area equestrians seeking a scenic, nature-rich boarding experience.

name: Greene Valley Stables
description: A 38-acre horse boarding facility in Ruckersville, Virginia offering both indoor and outdoor boarding. Features a 20-stall barn, a 60x200 lighted show-regulation indoor riding arena, and a wash stall with hot and cold water. Private lessons available at affordable rates, making it a great choice for riders at all levels in the Central Virginia region.

trainers.name: Greene Valley Instructor
trainers.bio: Private riding instructor offering lessons at $40/hour across multiple disciplines.

name: Keelona Farm
description: Established in 1984, Keelona Farm sits on 75 acres with miles of open riding trails in Charlottesville, Virginia. The custom-built 14-stall barn features 12x12 stalls with several 12x24 foaling stalls. A well-respected facility known for decades of quality horse care in the heart of Virginia's horse country.

name: Sunny Fox Farms
description: An equestrian facility in the Texas Hill Country serving San Marcos and Wimberley. Boarding includes access to tack room space, use of all amenities, deworming, supplement and blanket management, and three free lessons per week. A great value option for riders looking for full-service care with included instruction.

trainers.name: Sunny Fox Farms Instructor
trainers.bio: On-site instructor providing three included lessons per week for all boarders.

name: Riverbend Equestrian Center
description: A premier boarding facility in Jupiter Farms, Florida featuring 12x12 stalls, an on-site barn manager, a 266x135 ft fully irrigated ring, and individual grass turnouts. Caters to hunters, jumpers, dressage, and trail riders. The barn includes an air-conditioned lounge with full-size refrigerator, ice maker, TV, couch, microwave, and WiFi throughout.

trainers.name: Riverbend Training Staff
trainers.bio: Experienced trainers specializing in hunters, jumpers, and dressage with on-site barn management.

name: Westridge Farms
description: Premier Hunter/Jumper stable located in Dripping Springs, Texas, only 30 minutes west of downtown Austin. Westridge Farms welcomes riders of all levels, offering quality training, exceptional care, and a fun atmosphere. The team attends 'A' rated shows and local clubs both regionally and nationally, and offers lessons, training, and horse sales/leases.

trainers.name: Christine Rishell
trainers.bio: Owner and head trainer. Started riding at age 5, earned USEF Bronze Medal in 2012. Trains with enthusiasm, creativity, structure, respect, and humor.

trainers.name: Mia Kertson
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer and Texas Tech graduate with a successful junior and collegiate riding career.

name: Redwood Farm
description: Where Excellence Meets Horsemanship. Redwood Farm works with riders of all levels to transform them into top competitors through a comprehensive program built on horsemanship, trust, and partnership between horse and rider. The facility specializes in importing and developing quality horses while providing personalized training. Riders have been guided to USEF Pony Finals, USEF Medal Finals, ASPCA Maclay Finals, and more.

trainers.name: Ashleigh Stewart
trainers.bio: Founder and head trainer with 18+ years of experience. Grew up riding with Fran and Joe Dotoli in Massachusetts. Detail-oriented, hands-on instruction emphasizing thoughtful development and long-term success.

trainers.name: Hayden Stewart
trainers.bio: Co-trainer who finished Top 25 at both the USEF Medal Finals and the ASPCA Maclay Finals in 2016. Competed in High Junior Jumpers and national grand prix. Texas A&M Equestrian Team rider.

trainers.name: Debbie Seymour
trainers.bio: Freelance trainer with 35+ years in the hunter/jumper industry. Co-founded Bit by Bit Farms in 2002. Has coached riders to Pony Finals and Junior Hunter Finals.

name: Rio Vista Farm
description: The Leading Hunter Jumper Barn in Austin, Texas since 1995. Rio Vista Farm is a full care Hunter Jumper Boarding and Training Facility offering private and group lessons for beginners through competitive riders, summer camps for ages 7-16, and a show team competing from Cross Rails to Grand Prix. Riders regularly appear in year-end high-point standings at National, State, and Local levels.

trainers.name: Susan McMarris
trainers.bio: Head trainer. Meredith Manor School of Equestrian Studies graduate (1984). Operating hunter/jumper barns since 1985. Board Member of the Texas Hunter Jumper Association. Specializes in taking riders from summer camp level to year-end high point winner.

trainers.name: Emilie Gardner
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer and West Texas A&M graduate who competes nationally.

trainers.name: Lauri Bothern
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer with 20+ years of teaching experience, working with all age groups.

trainers.name: Haylee Mynyk
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer with 25 years of experience, present since Rio Vista's inception.

name: Glendaloch Farm
description: Glendaloch Farm focuses on the joy of riding. Students are taught horsemanship and Hunter/Jumper riding skills that can take them to any level. The operation values camaraderie, challenge, and delight in riding and showing, with instruction available for beginners through advanced riders. Led by Crista Bandini with over 40 years of riding experience.

trainers.name: Crista Bandini
trainers.bio: Head trainer with over 40 years of riding experience, offering lessons for hunter/jumper enthusiasts at all skill levels.

name: Polo Club Equine
description: Polo Club Equine is located on 28 acres in the beautiful Hill Country towards Dripping Springs. In each of their barns, you will find clean and spacious stalls. The facility offers equestrian horse training and is open 7 days a week. Rated 5.0 stars on Google.

name: Galloping Springs Ranch
description: Dressage training, lessons, and sales in Dripping Springs. World class instruction in a warm and welcoming environment. Galloping Springs Ranch has operated in the Texas Hill Country for more than 20 years. Home of Ashley Shaw Dressage.

trainers.name: Ashley Shaw
trainers.bio: Dressage specialist providing world class instruction at Galloping Springs Ranch.

name: White Fences Equestrian Center
description: Premium full-care horse boarding and professional training just outside Austin in Manor, Texas. White Fences provides exceptional care, large barns, expansive pastures, and a quiet, supportive environment. Specializing in Dressage with a focused, progressive training program designed to develop balance, connection, and harmony. Also provides personalized horseback riding lessons for youth and adults.

name: Switch Willo Stables
description: Unsurpassed excellence in Hunter/Jumper training and competition. Located on 26 beautifully wooded acres in the heart of Northwest Austin, Switch Willo Stables provides the perfect environment in which horses and riders can develop and flourish. Offers lessons, boarding, training, camps, and horse shows.

trainers.name: Holly Mortimer
trainers.bio: Lessons coordinator at Switch Willo Stables.

trainers.name: Wendy Kratzer
trainers.bio: Camp coordinator at Switch Willo Stables.

name: Scissortail Hill Equestrian
description: A horse riding school in Austin, Texas rated 5.0 stars on Google. Located on US-183, Scissortail Hill Equestrian provides equestrian instruction and training services to the Austin area.

name: Upland Farm
description: Elite dressage training facility for the avid dressage rider in the heart of Texas Hill Country. Founded by Marcia Haas and Ashley Bearden, Upland Farm is a community of good people who love their horses and support each other. Offers stall board with oversized stalls and seasonal turnout, customizable training programs, and horse sales and consignment with connections throughout the US and Europe.

trainers.name: Marcia Haas
trainers.bio: Co-founder of Upland Farm, providing elite dressage training in the Texas Hill Country.

trainers.name: Ashley Bearden
trainers.bio: Co-founder of Upland Farm, focused on developing riders and horses through classical dressage.

name: Cadence Ranch
description: Classical Dressage Training, Instruction, and Sales on 50 acres in Central Texas with 24/7 pasture turnout. Features a standard 20x60 indoor dressage arena, air-conditioned tack room, TheraPlate equine therapy system, and SI PEMF therapy blanket. Customized feeding and training programs developed collaboratively with veterinarians, farriers, and body workers.

trainers.name: Christine Calao
trainers.bio: Owner and head trainer, USDF Gold Medalist.

trainers.name: Emma Winter
trainers.bio: Assistant trainer, USDF Bronze Medalist.

name: Waterloo Dressage
description: Dressage instruction and horse training facility in Austin, Texas operated by Grace Harris. Offers rider instruction, horse training, and horses for sale or lease.

trainers.name: Grace Harris
trainers.bio: Dressage instructor and horse trainer at Waterloo Dressage.

name: Riding Club of Austin
description: A woman-owned full-service equestrian facility conveniently located in Southwest Austin. Offers boarding services and horseback riding instruction. Rated 5.0 stars on Google.
